meaning: v.洗擦,擦净,使(气体)净化,擦洗n.洗擦,擦净,擦洗者,矮树,灌木,丛林地,矮小的人(或动物)adj.次等的,矮小的,临时凑合的
examples: I started to scrub off the dirt.
I've given the floor a good scrub.
The bird disappeared into the scrub.
To avoid contaminating the little critters, scientists have to shower and scrub before entering mouse quarters.
The trio also brought in Dutch tax lawyer Peter Hamelink to scrub the books.
